article_title: Bylaw 14752 — Housing Agreement (4990 Bennett Street) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby locks in affordable rental units at 4990 Bennett Street under binding housing agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council passed Bylaw 14752 on July 8, 2025, authorizing a legally binding housing agreement with LM Riviera Homes Ltd. for their development at 4990 Bennett Street. The agreement requires the developer to provide non-market rental units (below-market-rate apartments reserved for lower-income households) in a 6-storey rental building as part of a larger 35-storey residential project.
briefs.action_required: If you are LM Riviera Homes Ltd., sign the housing agreement with the City of Burnaby to proceed.
